questions.text: An [mm] PR with a proposed mental-model update was opened for this PR — review and decide on it (merge or close), then comment /mm-answer mm-pr: <decided> to continue.

rationale: PR #7 changes the mental model by introducing persistent URMA data-plane failure as a distinct client-side worker-switch trigger with configurable success-rate windows, TCP-fallback continuity, and failed-switch backoff; evidence includes UrmaSuccessRateTracker, new gflags, URMA Set/Get result accounting, and URMA_DATA_PLANE_FAILURE handling.
